domains.name: Domain 1: Fundamentals of AI and ML
Domain 5: Security, Compliance, and Governance for AI Solutions

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to train and deploy custom ML models with managed infrastructure?
questions.explanation: SageMaker provides end-to-end ML building, training, and deployment.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to label raw data for supervised learning at scale?
questions.explanation: Ground Truth helps create labeled datasets using human and automated labeling.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to run batch inference on large datasets without managing servers?
questions.explanation: Batch Transform runs predictions on large datasets asynchronously.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to store and version ML model artifacts?
questions.explanation: Model Registry catalogs models for approval and deployment workflows.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to perform time-series forecasting with AutoML capabilities?
questions.explanation: SageMaker Autopilot and Canvas support low-code ML including forecasting use cases.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to classify images with a pre-trained API without building models?
questions.explanation: Rekognition provides pre-built computer vision APIs.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to convert text to lifelike speech?
questions.explanation: Polly is a text-to-speech service.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to extract text and data from scanned documents?
questions.explanation: Textract uses ML to read forms and tables from documents.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to discover insights and relationships in unstructured text?
questions.explanation: Comprehend is a natural language processing (NLP) service.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to translate text between languages at scale?
questions.explanation: Translate provides neural machine translation.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to search for similar vectors in embedding datasets?

options.text: Amazon OpenSearch Service or Aurora pgvector
Amazon S3 Glacier Deep Archive only

questions.explanation: Vector search supports similarity queries for embeddings in search engines or databases.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to orchestrate ML pipelines with repeatable steps?
questions.explanation: SageMaker Pipelines automates end-to-end ML workflows.

questions.text: Which service should you use to train and deploy custom ML models with managed infrastructure?
questions.explanation: SageMaker provides end-to-end ML building, training, and deployment.

questions.text: What is the MOST appropriate AWS solution to train and deploy custom ML models with managed infrastructure?
questions.explanation: SageMaker provides end-to-end ML building, training, and deployment.

questions.text: A team must train and deploy custom ML models with managed infrastructure. Which option meets the requirement?
questions.explanation: SageMaker provides end-to-end ML building, training, and deployment.

questions.text: Which service should you use to label raw data for supervised learning at scale?
questions.explanation: Ground Truth helps create labeled datasets using human and automated labeling.

questions.text: What is the MOST appropriate AWS solution to label raw data for supervised learning at scale?
questions.explanation: Ground Truth helps create labeled datasets using human and automated labeling.

questions.text: A team must label raw data for supervised learning at scale. Which option meets the requirement?
questions.explanation: Ground Truth helps create labeled datasets using human and automated labeling.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to access foundation models from multiple providers through one API?
questions.explanation: Bedrock offers FMs from Amazon and partners via a unified API.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to invoke models for text generation with on-demand throughput?
questions.explanation: Bedrock supports on-demand and provisioned throughput for inference.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to customize a foundation model with labeled examples for a specific task?
questions.explanation: Fine-tuning adapts FMs using your domain-specific data.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to compare latency and quality across foundation models in a playground?
questions.explanation: Playgrounds let you experiment with prompts and models.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to generate images from text prompts using AWS generative AI?

options.text: Amazon Titan Image Generator or Stability AI models in Bedrock

questions.explanation: Bedrock supports image generation models for creative workloads.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to understand tokens as billing units for generative models?
questions.explanation: Generative models often bill per input/output tokens.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to reduce hallucinations by grounding responses in private data?
questions.explanation: RAG retrieves relevant documents before the model generates an answer.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to store prompt templates and versions for teams?

options.text: Amazon Bedrock Prompt Management or similar versioning patterns

questions.explanation: Managing prompts as code/templates improves consistency and governance.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to evaluate model outputs for quality before production?

options.text: Model evaluation in Amazon Bedrock or SageMaker

questions.explanation: Systematic evaluation compares models and prompts against benchmarks.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to use embeddings to represent text for semantic search?

options.text: Amazon Titan Embeddings or Cohere Embed on Bedrock

questions.explanation: Embeddings convert text to vectors for similarity search.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to build a conversational assistant that calls APIs and queries data?
questions.explanation: Agents orchestrate FM reasoning with tools and knowledge bases.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to connect private documents to a foundation model for Q&A?
questions.explanation: Knowledge bases ingest, chunk, embed, and retrieve documents for RAG.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to chunk documents and store vectors for retrieval?

options.text: Amazon OpenSearch Serverless or Amazon Aurora vector store with Bedrock

questions.explanation: Vector stores hold embeddings for semantic retrieval in RAG pipelines.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to expose a generative AI feature behind a REST API to web clients?

options.text: Amazon API Gateway with AWS Lambda and Bedrock

questions.explanation: API Gateway + Lambda is a common serverless pattern for GenAI apps.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to cache frequent model responses to reduce cost and latency?
questions.explanation: Caching repeated prompts lowers inference spend and improves UX.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to run inference in a VPC without public internet for data residency?
questions.explanation: VPC endpoints keep Bedrock traffic on the AWS network.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to stream tokens to clients for responsive chat UIs?

options.text: Amazon Bedrock Converse API with streaming

questions.explanation: Streaming returns partial responses as the model generates text.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to moderate harmful content in model inputs and outputs?
questions.explanation: Guardrails filter topics, PII, and harmful content.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to log prompts and completions for audit?

options.text: Amazon CloudWatch Logs and model invocation logging

questions.explanation: Invocation logging supports compliance and troubleshooting.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to deploy a small custom model at the edge?

options.text: AWS IoT Greengrass with optimized models or edge devices

questions.explanation: Edge inference places models closer to devices when cloud latency is too high.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to detect bias and explain model predictions?
questions.explanation: Clarify provides fairness and explainability tools for ML.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to document model cards and human review for high-risk AI?

options.text: Responsible AI governance processes on AWS

questions.explanation: Governance includes documentation, human oversight, and risk assessment.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to ensure training data represents diverse populations?

options.text: Inclusive dataset design and Clarify bias metrics

questions.explanation: Representative data reduces unfair outcomes across groups.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to inform users they interact with AI-generated content?
questions.explanation: Transparency builds trust and meets emerging AI regulations.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to minimize collection of personal data in fine-tuning datasets?
questions.explanation: Collect only necessary data and remove identifiers where possible.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to establish human-in-the-loop for consequential decisions?

options.text: Amazon A2I or review workflows in SageMaker
Fully automated approvals with no audit

questions.explanation: Human review reduces risk for high-impact predictions.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to test models for robustness to prompt injection?

options.text: Red teaming and guardrails for GenAI
Using production data in dev without controls

questions.explanation: Adversarial prompt testing improves GenAI application security.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to encrypt model artifacts and training data at rest?

options.text: AWS KMS with Amazon S3 and SageMaker

questions.explanation: KMS manages keys for encryption across AI data stores.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to control which IAM principals can invoke Bedrock models?

options.text: Wildcard * on all actions for everyone

questions.explanation: Least-privilege IAM restricts model access.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to discover sensitive training data in S3 buckets?
questions.explanation: Macie finds PII and sensitive data in object storage.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to audit API calls to AI services?
questions.explanation: CloudTrail logs management and data events for governance.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to isolate training jobs in a private network?
questions.explanation: VPC config keeps training traffic private.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to rotate API keys and secrets for third-party models?
questions.explanation: Secrets Manager automates secret rotation.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to apply organizational policies across AI accounts?
questions.explanation: SCPs set guardrails for services including Bedrock and SageMaker.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to monitor model endpoints for drift?
questions.explanation: Model Monitor detects data and quality drift in production.

questions.text: Which TWO official AWS resources help you prepare for AWS Certified AI Practitioner? (Select TWO.)
questions.explanation: Use official AWS exam guides, Skill Builder, and AWS documentation—not real exam content.

questions.text: Which are AWS services used for encryption or key management? (Select TWO.)
questions.explanation: KMS manages keys; Secrets Manager stores and rotates secrets.

questions.text: Which TWO practices align with the AWS Well-Architected Framework? (Select TWO.)

options.text: Design for failure and automate recovery
Use single-AZ for all production data stores

questions.explanation: Reliability and operational excellence emphasize automation, testing, and learning from failure.

questions.text: According to AWS best practices documented in 'AIF-C01 Exam Guide', what should you do FIRST when addressing Fundamentals of AI and ML objectives?

Use root user credentials for daily operations
